gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.ocr_text: MICH DEC 1 8 1975 THE UNIVERSITY OF MICHIGAN 1817 Jouvea pilosa (Presl) Scribn. University of Michigan Herbarium 1122841 122841 RANCHO SANTA ANA BOTANIC GARDEN PLANTS OF MEXICO Distichlis spicata (L.) Greene Nayarit: Isabel Island, E of Tres Marias Is. Volcanic islet--cormorant and tern breeding ground. In open, level to slightly sloping areas favored by the terns for nesting, near the beach; surrounded by low forest consisting almost entirely of Crateva tapia(3-4 m tall). Porous soil. CHRISTOPHER DAVIDSON 2060 29 April 1973
